transcript: Worth at least three dollars and a smile. Balcony, I'll wait for ya. The last thing I will need besides that is a unison pack. With me, ready, and clap, clap, clap, clap, louder! Faster, you. Please tell me about coming forward and supporting Street Theater. Have a great rest of your day here at Theater 39. Please don't leave without coming forward, supporting Street Theater by tipping that hat. And please don't leave without giving my lovely volunteers one last big, beautiful round of applause. We're all going to bow together. Ready, steady, and bow. Thank you so much. You've got to get your hat. No, you've got your hat with your girlfriend.

We're all going to bow together. Ready, steady, and bow.
Thank you so much. You've got to get your hat. No, you've got your hat with your girlfriend.
